evals.prompt: Run tauri-debug-build and reverify the Git Graph flicker finding from the 2026-06-22 smoke report in the packaged app.
evals.expected_output: A runtime smoke plan or execution report with debug app build, app path, workspace path, Git Graph selection, .git watcher probe, pass/fail evidence, and cleanup.
expectations: If updater artifact signing fails because `TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY` is missing, reports that failure and uses `--config '{"bundle":{"createUpdaterArtifacts":false}}'` only for local packaged runtime smoke.
Includes a .git watcher probe and checks detail stability instead of only checking that commits render.
Includes cleanup of probe files and debug app processes.

evals.prompt: Smoke test Browser preview screenshot capture in the debug app, but the machine may not have macOS Screen Recording permission.
evals.expected_output: A smoke plan that distinguishes real capture failures from permission blockers and records the permission prompt or screencapture region.
expectations: Uses a safe local or loopback page.
Notes that Screen Recording permission may block final PNG verification.
Reports permission-blocked capture as incomplete rather than pass.
Includes cleanup for any temporary HTTP server.
